mapper.select: select b.warehouse_id, i.area_id, i.location_id, i.product_id, b.customer_id, o.sales_user_id, coalesce(sum(case when b.bill_type like 'IN_%' then i.quantity else 0 end), 0) as in_quantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.bill_type like 'OUT_%' then i.quantity else 0 end), 0) as out_quantity from wms_stock_bill b join wms_stock_bill_item i on i.bill_id = b.bill_id and i.del_flag = '0' left join oms_order o on o.order_id = b.related_order_id where b.del_flag = '0' and b.bill_status = 'COMPLETED' and ( #{statType} = 'DAILY' and DATE(b.bill_date) = DATE(#{statDate}) or #{statType} = 'MONTHLY' and DATE_TRUNC('month', b.bill_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', #{statDate}::date) or #{statType} = 'QUARTERLY' and DATE_TRUNC('quarter', b.bill_date) = DATE_TRUNC('quarter', #{statDate}::date) or #{statType} = 'YEARLY' and DATE_TRUNC('year', b.bill_date) = DATE_TRUNC('year', #{statDate}::date) ) group by b.warehouse_id, i.area_id, i.location_id, i.product_id, b.customer_id, o.sales_user_id
mapper.insert: insert into wms_stock_statistics(stat_date, stat_type, warehouse_id, area_id, location_id, product_id, customer_id, sales_user_id, in_quantity, out_quantity, create_time) values(#{statDate}, #{statType}, #{warehouseId}, #{areaId}, #{locationId}, #{productId}, #{customerId}, #{salesUserId}, #{inQuantity}, #{outQuantity}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

insert into wms_stock_statistics(stat_date, stat_type, warehouse_id, area_id, location_id, product_id, customer_id, sales_user_id, in_quantity, out_quantity, create_time) values(#{statDate}, #{statType}, #{warehouseId}, #{areaId}, #{locationId}, #{productId}, #{customerId}, #{salesUserId}, #{inQuantity}, #{outQuantity}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) on conflict(stat_date, stat_type, warehouse_id, area_id, location_id, product_id, customer_id, sales_user_id) do update set in_quantity = excluded.in_quantity, out_quantity = excluded.out_quantity
